parameters.content:
## Payment Failed Recovery

Trigger: Stripe invoice.payment_failed webhook
Sequence: Day 1 → Day 3 → Day 7 → Day 14 → Day 21 (escalation)

**SETUP:** Configure Stripe webhook for invoice.payment_failed event pointing to this webhook URL

parameters.subject: Action needed: payment issue with your PA CROP Services account
parameters.html:
Payment Issue

Hi {{$json.name}},

We weren't able to process your payment of ${{$json.amount}} for PA CROP Services. This is usually caused by an expired card or insufficient funds.

We'll automatically retry the payment on {{$json.nextAttempt}}. To avoid any interruption to your registered office services, please update your payment method:

Update Payment Method

Questions? Reply to this email or call BUSINESS_PHONE.

— PA CROP Services Team

parameters.subject: Reminder: please update your payment method — PA CROP Services
parameters.html:
Quick Reminder

Hi {{$json.name}},

We still haven't been able to process your payment of ${{$json.amount}}. To keep your registered office services active, please update your payment method at your earliest convenience.

Update Payment Method

— PA CROP Services Team

parameters.subject: ⚠️ Your PA CROP Services account may be interrupted
parameters.html:
Service Interruption Warning

Hi {{$json.name}},

We've been unable to process your payment of ${{$json.amount}} for 7 days now. Without a valid payment method, we may need to suspend your registered office services.

If your services are suspended, you would need to designate a new registered office with the PA Department of State.

Update Payment Now

If you're having trouble, just reply to this email. We're here to help.

— PA CROP Services Team

parameters.subject: 🚨 Final notice: PA CROP Services account suspension in 7 days
parameters.html:
Final Notice

Hi {{$json.name}},

This is your final notice. Your payment of ${{$json.amount}} has been outstanding for 14 days. Your account will be suspended in 7 days if we don't receive payment.

After suspension, you will need to file a Change of Registered Office with the PA Department of State ($70 fee) to designate a new registered office.

Pay Now to Keep Your Account

— PA CROP Services Team
